entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: Primary user whose distinctive phrases are extracted for voice authenticity in emails

entities.name: Metaprompter v6
entities.context: Core framework with visible-state headers, router alignment, and nuance loader for email generation

entities.name: MasterVoiceSchema
entities.context: Voice fidelity schema (version ≥ 1.2) used to mirror distinctive diction

entities.name: Audit-First Structuring
entities.context: Principle requiring building maps (Missing-Content, Resonance Pool, Link Map, SpeakerQuoteMap) before drafting

entities.name: Socratic Expansion Layer
entities.context: Method that pauses for confirmation and refinements with iterative loop support

entities.name: Voice Fidelity
entities.context: Principle ensuring authentic voice through MasterVoiceSchema and transcript echoing

entities.name: Transcript Language Echoing
entities.context: Technique extracting Vrijen's distinctive phrases (confidence ≥ 0.75) for email authenticity

entities.name: Confidence-Based Link Insertion
entities.context: Method auto-inserting links only when confidence ≥ 0.75, marking uncertain as [[MISSING]]

entities.name: Readability Guardrails
entities.context: Constraints enforcing Flesch-Kincaid ≤ 10, sentence length 16-22 words, max 4 sentences per paragraph

entities.name: Enhanced Dial Mapping
entities.context: Technique calculating warmthScore and familiarityScore for tone calibration

entities.name: Map-Archive Integration
entities.context: System for auto-pushing distilled insights after approval

entities.name: Delay-Sensitivity
entities.context: Feature auto-detecting elapsed days since meeting, prepending apology if > 2 days

entities.name: Fail-Safe Drafting
entities.context: Principle preventing email composition until user approves maps and dials

entities.name: Missing-Content Map
entities.context: Audit artifact built before drafting to identify gaps

entities.name: Resonance Pool
entities.context: Audit artifact collecting resonant content before drafting

entities.name: SpeakerQuoteMap
entities.context: Audit artifact for speaker-aware parsing with quote attribution

entities.name: dialInferenceReport
entities.context: Report where readability violations are flagged
